title: 修复安装器 smoke 的 PR 基线传递

sources.reason: The failing installer smoke step invokes make check-ai after intentionally clearing the inherited baseline.
The installed no-active check-ai branch requires an explicit AI_BASE_COMMIT for its PR gate.
The smoke flow verifies the installed template's PR ownership gate against the temporary repository base.

riskAssessment.reason: The change affects only the CI smoke invocation and must preserve environment isolation while supplying the temporary repository baseline.

executionDecision.reason: The remote failure is reproducible, and the bounded fix is an explicit base argument in the smoke test.

preReviewWarnings: Review that AI_BASE_COMMIT remains unset for source checkout isolation but the temporary repository uses its own saved base SHA.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The installer smoke test passes the temporary repository's saved base SHA to make check-ai.
The smoke test continues to isolate the source checkout's AI_BASE_COMMIT before installation.
The installed template runs both local check-ai and PR check-ai successfully in the temporary repository.
The full local quality and AI governance gates pass.
guidelines: Keep CI commands explicit about the repository whose baseline they consume.
Do not weaken or remove the installed template's PR ownership gate.
Keep the change limited to smoke-test baseline propagation.

intent.problem: The installer smoke test fails after successful installation because make check-ai runs without a baseline after AI_BASE_COMMIT was unset, so its no-active branch cannot complete the final PR gate.
constraints: Use the temporary repository's initial commit as the PR baseline.
intent.rationale: Passing the saved local base explicitly makes the test deterministic and validates the same installed-template PR workflow used by adopters.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: temporary repository check-ai with explicit local base
evidence: The smoke command passes AI_BASE_COMMIT="$base" to make check-ai and then runs check-ai-pr with the same base.
The smoke subshell still unsets inherited AI_BASE_COMMIT before installing into the temporary repository.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continued remediation of the failing remote review gates.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
